stratified_allocation: 2500 trials per family/symbol; 2000 grammar samples plus 500 deterministic local refinements
random_baseline: 2500 trials per family/symbol, same total 10000-trial budget
deduplication: canonical strategy identity; duplicate trials consume ledger trials and are rejected before evaluation
lineage: template, parent, sampler mode, and stage recorded for every trial
checkpoint: every 250 trials; restart must produce byte-equivalent component output
probe_rule: 36 of 36 structural cells must be reachable; frozen evaluation minimum is 24
performance_independence: probe does not load market data, rank, evaluate OOS, or inspect lockbox
